ns1:revision.ns1:comment: page creation as part of wiki migration effort
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
Once a year, the Lustre™ Engineering team gathers to discuss new features under development and testing efforts. This week-long event is known as the Lustre all-hands meeting. The Development presentations made at the December 2008 all-hands meeting are available here:
* [[media:Simplified_InteropRecovery.pdf|''Simplified Interoperability Recovery'']] - Huang Hua * [[media:RecoveryTalk_2009.pdf|''Recovery Overview'']] - Robert Read * [[media:Quotas-TOI.pdf|''Quotas-TOI'']] - Yong Fan * [[media:QualityInitiativeTalk.pdf|''Quality Initiative Talk'']] - Robert Read * [[media:OST_Pools.pdf|''OST Pools'']] - Nathan Rutman * [[media:OST_Migration_RAID1_SNS.pdf|''OST Migration RAID1 SNS'']] - Andreas Dilger * [[media:NRS.pdf|''Lustre NRS Simulation'']] - Yingjin Qian, Wang Di * [[media:LustreInterop_1_8.pdf|''Lustre Interoperability 1.8'']] - Huang Hua * [[media:HDFS.pdf|''HDFS'']] - Wang Di * [[media:GIT_Overview.pdf|''GIT Overview'']] - Robert Read * [[media:COS-TOI.pdf|''COS-TOI'']] - Alexander Zarochentsev * [[media:CLIO-TOI.pdf|''CLIO-TOI'']] - Nikita Danilov * [[media:CLIO-TOI-notes.pdf|''CLIO-TOI-notes'']] - Nikita Danilov * [[media:CLIO.pdf|''CLIO'']] - Nikita Danilov
[[Category: Events]]
